name: Taco Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble pork sausage into a 1-quart casserole.
2. Stir in onion.
3. Cook uncovered on 100% power for 4 minutes or until meat is no longer pink, stirring once.
4. Drain off fat.
5. Stir in tomato sauce, canned green chili peppers, flour, chili powder, and garlic powder.
6. Cook covered on 100% power for 2 to 3 minutes or until slightly thickened and bubbly.
7. In a salad bowl, toss together lettuce, shredded carrot, and halved tomatoes.
8. Top with sausage mixture, shredded cheese, and taco chips.
